body: Following up on your earlier note about the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) portfolio review — I wanted to share a few thoughts on the two climate infrastructure deals you flagged before we jump on a call. I've been doing some digging into the carbon capture space over the past few weeks, and I think one of those companies in particular warrants a closer look at the Series-A stage given where grid-edge storage pricing is heading. My concern with the other one is less about the technology and more about the founding team's go-to-market assumptions, which feel optimistic relative to what I've been seeing in procurement cycles. Happy to put together a short memo on both if that would be useful before your LP update at the end of the month. Let me know when you have 30 minutes — I'm fairly open next week.
